attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
DV_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR_KEY
 ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  
,L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  
,L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  
,SALES_COVERAGE_CODE           
,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE              
,SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE     
,L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_TV_ETLONLY  RSHT
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_TRNGLTD_MTH_CNTL MTH_CNTL
ON(RSHT.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR_KEY    = MTH_CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE ,L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
ORDER BY DV_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR_KEY
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
,L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
,L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
DESC) = 1

SELECT
GL.PRODUCT_KEY
,GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT)  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT            
,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT)  DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT  
,SUM(DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM)  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT)  DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT              
,SUM(DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT)  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT            
,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT)  DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT                
,SUM(DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT)  DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT          
,SUM(DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT)  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT          
,SUM(DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT)  DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT  
,SUM(DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY) DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY                      
,SUM(DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY) DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY    
,SUM(CASE WHEN GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('CM') THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ELSE 0 END)  DV_CREDIT_MEMO_AMT 
,SUM(CASE WHEN GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('DM') THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ELSE 0 END) DV_DEBIT_MEMO_AMT
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM) - CASE WHEN GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('CM', 'DM') THEN ZEROIFNULL(GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT) ELSE 0 END) DV_INV_REV_BASE_LIST_AMT
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT) - CASE WHEN GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('CM', 'DM') THEN ZEROIFNULL(GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT) ELSE 0 END) DV_SHIPPED_REV_AMT
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS','SLS_ADJ') AND GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD = 'POS ALLOCATION' THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
                     WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ' THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
                     WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR' AND GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  = 'ERP_ADJ' THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ELSE 0  END))  DV_NET_ADJ_AMT
,SUM(( CASE WHEN GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' THEN ZEROIFNULL(GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT) ELSE 0 END) +   
       (CASE WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS','SLS_ADJ') AND GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD = 'POS ALLOCATION' THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT 
             WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ' AND MT.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID NOT IN ('NMS','WARRANTY') THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT 
             WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR' AND GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  = 'ERP_ADJ' THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0  END)) DV_REV_STANDARD_COST_AMT
,SUM(( CASE WHEN  MT.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID='DIRECT' AND MT.L3_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID <>'REMARKETING INVOICES' THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT ELSE 0 END )) DV_DIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT
,SUM(( CASE WHEN  MT.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID='DIRECT' THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END  )) DV_DIRECT_COST_ADJ_AMT
,SUM(( CASE WHEN  MT.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID='Indirect'  AND GL.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD ='REVENUE' THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT ELSE 0 END )) DV_INDIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT
,SUM(( CASE WHEN  MT.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID='Indirect'  AND GL.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD ='COGS' THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END )) DV_INDIRECT_COGS_ADJ_AMT
,SUM(( CASE WHEN  MT.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID='GMBREVMGN'  AND GL.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD ='COGS'THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END  )) DV_GMB_COGS_ADJ_AMT
,SUM((CASE WHEN MT.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID IN ('Excess and Obsolete') THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END)) DV_EXCESS_OBSOLETE_ADJ_AMT
,SUM((CASE WHEN MT.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID IN ('Overhead') THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END)) DV_OVERHEAD_ADJ_AMT
,SUM((CASE WHEN MT.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID IN ('Variance OCOGS','Variance/OCOGS')THEN GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END)) DV_VARIANCE_ADJ_AMT
,SUM(( CASE WHEN  MT.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID='WARRANTY'   AND GL.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD ='COGS'THEN  GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END  )) DV_WARRANTY_ADJ_AMT            
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE GL
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_TRNGLTD_MTH_CNTL WGRTMC
ON( GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=WGRTMC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_SALES_HIER RSH 
ON (GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND RSH.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR_KEY=GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_DIRECT_INDIRECT_ADJ_TYPE MT
ON ( GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD=MT.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
AND    GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD=MT.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD  
AND GL.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD=MT.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD )
WHERE  
 GL.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG='Y'
AND GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE IN ('CORP. REVENUE','UNKNOWN') 
AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('AR-OOD','AR-1C')/*AR-1C is added as part of Q3FY14_CE_RUSSIA*/
GROUP BY 
GL.PRODUCT_KEY
,   GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,	GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
